# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: linkerd-service-account
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: linkerd-rbac
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: cluster-admin
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: linkerd-service-account
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: linkerd
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: LinkerdConfig
metadata:
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  proxy-auto-inject: true
  authorization-policy:
    mode: "STRICT"
